title: Functional Identification
definition: The ability to separate the essential from the unnecessary in communication.

difficulty_levels.beginner: It's like knowing when to use a map and when to be the guide for others, without getting lost yourself.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The capacity to discern the core information necessary for effective communication, while avoiding unnecessary details or confusion.
difficulty_levels.expert: A philosophical concept that emphasizes the importance of identifying and focusing on essential aspects in communication, while shedding non-essential elements.

extra_fields.insight: The difference between getting lost in the map versus effectively using it to guide others.
